parsed_profile.name: Taylor Morgan
parsed_profile.summary: Data analyst and early-career AI product builder with experience translating business needs into dashboards, workflow automations, and candidate-facing tools. Strong interest in job-tech, resume optimization, and LLM-assisted user experiences.

bullets: Built reporting dashboards that reduced weekly recruiting ops review time by 35%.
Partnered with recruiters and engineers to define metrics for candidate funnel performance.
Tested prompt variations for internal writing assistants used in resume and cover letter generation.
Cleaned and analyzed patient operations data using Python and SQL.
Created Tableau dashboards for leadership to track appointment utilization trends.
Documented KPI definitions and presented weekly insights to stakeholders.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics
details: Relevant Coursework: Data Mining, Database Systems, Applied Machine Learning

bullets: Built a prototype application that tailors resumes and cover letters from candidate data and job descriptions.
Designed prompts and structured outputs for recruiter-friendly document generation.
Created a lightweight LLM workflow to generate likely interview questions from job postings.
